allow: PowerShell(try { magick --version } catch {}; try { inkscape --version } catch {}; try { \(Get-Command magick -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "magick: not found" }; try { \(Get-Command inkscape -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "inkscape: not found" }; try { \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "node: not found" })
